Tie-in survey showing setbacks and finish floor elevation
Letter on fire-treated lumber if applicable
Fire Alarm Monitoring letter received from Owner
Letter from Structural Engineer certifying building as-builts, if necessary
Architect to issue Certificate of Substantial Completion Affidavit (date of S.C.)
Engineer Cert for all sitework-Paving & Utilities
Threshold Inpsection reports for Bldg Dept
Final Landscape acceptance letter for the LA of record submitted if required
All plan changes submitted and approved by Building Department
Health Department approval of water and sewer lines
Utility company's approval of water and sewer lines
Obtain Certificate of Occupancy (C.O.) . or Certificate of Completion, if shell building
Send copy of C.O. to Owner or Owner's Representative
Schedule meeting with Architect & Owner for punch list (date)
Schedule "turn-over" meeting with Owner & Owner's Representative
Give Owner list of subs and all warranty letters
Forward letter of appreciation to Owner
Complete final payment forms for each subcontractor
Date last contractual work on project was performed (date)
Flag 80 calendar days from last day HB worked on project (date)
Obtain Release of Liens from Subs
If final payment is not received, send letter to Owner that we intend to lien property
If final payment is not received within 88 days, file lien
Six months after completion of project, give photographs taken
Request from Owner a recommendation letter
Project Manager return all files, permit plans, and permit card to Estimator
